specs.reason: Primary spec for this feature. Documents the ownership audit, EMIT_REFCOUNT_CALLS flag, re-enable checklist, all borrowed-reference functions, and the known closure ownership bug (KI-refcount-closure). This change completes the work described in this spec.
GC re-enable spec. Documents KI-1 (auto-collection disabled due to JIT not emitting refcount calls). Re-enable is gated on EMIT_REFCOUNT_CALLS=true. This change resolves KI-1.
Closure spec. The root cause of SIGBUS blocking refcount enable is in mb_closure_release — asymmetric ownership (removes from HashMap without releasing captured values). The fix modifies closure.rs.
MbValue/MbObject/refcount infrastructure. Documents NaN-boxing tags, reference counting API (mb_retain/mb_release), retain_if_ptr/release_if_ptr helpers.
Cranelift backend core. Documents MIR-to-IR translation and runtime symbol wiring. EMIT_REFCOUNT_CALLS gates conditional blocks in shared mod.rs.
Runtime symbol registry. mb_retain_value/mb_release_value/mb_closure_release are registered here.
